torch_pattern:
cos = cos_cached[:, :, token_idx : token_idx + 1, ...]
sin = sin_cached[:, :, token_idx : token_idx + 1, ...]
x1 = x[..., : x.shape[-1] // 2]
x2 = x[..., x.shape[-1] // 2 :]
rotated = torch.cat((-x2, x1), dim=-1)
x_embed = (x * cos) + (rotated * sin)

config_template.input_tensor: x of shape [1, {N_HEADS}, {SEQ_LEN}, {HEAD_DIM}] (prefill) or [1, {BATCH}, {N_HEADS_OR_1}, {HEAD_DIM}] (decode), dtype must be bfloat16, TILE_LAYOUT
config_template.token_idx: {TOKEN_IDX} (int for decode -> cache sliced internally at [token_idx:token_idx+1]; None/omitted for prefill -> applied over full seq; decode output dim 2 padded to 32, reshape/slice back required)

weight_transform: Precompute full cos_cached/sin_cached tables of shape [1, 1, max_seq_len, head_dim] (HF-style RoPE; no transformation matrices and no Meta-format head permutation), convert to bfloat16 and TILE_LAYOUT, place on device once at setup. Per-token slicing is performed inside the op via token_idx; no per-step host transform needed. Inputs that are not bfloat16 must be typecast to bfloat16 before the op.

placement_observations.source: call_site: q_rot/k_rot immediately moved via ttnn.to_memory_config(q_rot, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, ttnn.bfloat16) in per-batch decode rotary loop

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, max_seq_len, head_dim] full-cache, resident for model lifetime
placement_observations.source: test: ttnn.Tensor(cos_cached, sincos_dtype).to(ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT).to(device) with default interleaved DRAM memory config

memory_config.shard_spec_template: model_config['ROTARY_EMBEDDING_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'] (may be sharded; tests convert via ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved when out_sharded)

placement_observations.source: call_site: memory_config=self.model_config['ROTARY_EMBEDDING_OUTPUT_MEMCFG']; test: if out_sharded: xtt = ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(xtt)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: q/k heads [1, n_heads, seq_len, head_dim], seq_len <= max_seq_len_cached
placement_observations.source: call_site: q_heads_1QSD_pre_rot typecast to bfloat16 if needed before op (interleaved default); assert seq_len <= max_seq_len_cached guard at every wrapper call site
